temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a pink and white plaid shirt, Ross, is speaking to another man whose back is to the camera. Ross gestures with his right hand as he makes a joke. The on-screen text 'WRITTEN by DANA KLEIN BORKOW' is superimposed over the scene. (Storyline: The scene begins with Ross making a joke, setting a conversational tone with his friend.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Conversational, slightly playful. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) Ross smiles and continues his joke, looking at the other man. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the living room, including a green couch and another wall sconce. (Storyline: Ross finishes his joke, implying that the other man's response was a poor one.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Amused, confident. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
